creator: pi@opsec.eu
text:
Hi!

The reason for the problem was:

/usr/local/share/aclocal/pkg.m4

was somehow missing on my system. 

After

  cd /usr/ports/devel/pkgconf
  make deinstall && make reinstall

libvdpau ran it's configure sucessfully.

-- 
pi@opsec.eu            +49 171 3101372                         8 years to go !
